subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-02 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In one of His prayers, the Blessed Beauty states: 'O God! Every eye is asleep, and all are reposing on the bed of ease…'
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک در مناجاتی میفرماید که خدایا هر چشمی در خواب است و جمیع نفوس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
